Foxy airdrops for loyal MetaMask users

The fox is loyal and rewards those who use the world's most popular web3 wallet. It pays to be a fox.

We support

Linea is home to the most innovative web3 projects

Linea’s mission is to make the decentralized internet safe and accessible for everyone. On Linea, dApps find everything they need to build, grow, and succeed.

Learn more
Bridge to Linea
STEP 1
CREATE A WALLET
STEP 2
BUY ETH
STEP 3
BRIDGE TO LINEA

1. Create a MetaMask Wallet

Download MetaMask or your wallet of choice from the App Store or Google play store for free. Desktop users can access the Google Chrome extension by going to metamask.io.

2. Buy ETH

You will need $ETH in your wallet on the Linea blockchain in order to buy $FOXY. If you don’t own any $ETH, you can buy ETH directly from MetaMask, buy on a centralized exchange, or transfer from another wallet that holds $ETH.

3. Bridge to Linea

You will then need to bridge your $ETH to the Linea network.

Watch the official video tutorial from Linea here.

2
3

FAQs

What is $FOXY?

$FOXY is the first “culture coin” on Linea, a combination of a memecoin and a community hub to foster the emergence of culture on the ecosystem. We like the fox.

What chain is $FOXY on?

$FOXY will be available exclusively on the Linea blockchain, an L2 network committed to Ethereum and bootstrapped by Consensys.

How do I bridge to Linea?

Users can bridge through Linea’s official bridge at https://bridge.linea.build/ or through approved third-party bridges.

Can I buy $FOXY on any decentralized exchanges?

Yes, $FOXY will be available to trade on Lynex.fi.

Can I buy $FOXY on any centralized exchanges?

Yes, $FOXY will be available to trade on OKX and Bybit.

Can I buy $FOXY on any decentralized exchanges?

Yes, $FOXY will be available for trade on a decentralized exchange. More info to follow shortly.

Who qualifies for the FOXY airdrop?

The Foxy team plans on several future airdrops. The initial airdrop will include the top 100,000 MetaMask swap users by number of swaps.

What is the official $FOXY contract address?

Coming soon… Be careful and DO NOT fall for scams and imitations. Only trust information from official Foxy channels, like the X (Twitter) account @FoxyLinea.

What is the total token supply of $FOXY?

10,000,000,000

What are the tokenomics of $FOXY?
  • Community Airdrops (MetaMask/Linea): 25%
  • Seed Round: 15%
  • Team and Support: 13%
  • Market Maker / CEX Liquidity: 10%
  • Future CEX listings: 10%
  • Advisors: 6%
  • Treasury: 6%
  • Ecosystem Partner Rewards: 5%
  • OTC for Projects and Funds: 5%
  • DEX Liquidity: 5%
